struct Order {
    id: u64,
    amount: f64,
    timestamp: u64,
}

fn get_highest_order(orders: &mut Vec<Order>) -> Option<&Order> {
    orders.sort_by(|a, b| b.amount.partial_cmp(&a.amount).unwrap());
    orders.first()
}

fn get_latest_order(orders: &mut Vec<Order>) -> Option<&Order> {
    orders.sort_by_key(|o| o.timestamp);
    orders.last()
}

fn get_smallest_amount(orders: &mut Vec<Order>) -> Option<f64> {
    orders.sort_by(|a, b| a.amount.partial_cmp(&b.amount).unwrap());
    orders.first().map(|o| o.amount)
}

fn get_earliest_order(orders: &mut Vec<Order>) -> Option<&Order> {
    orders.sort_by_key(|o| o.timestamp);
    orders.first()
}
